title: Deepslayte
description: Instamine deepslate with an efficiency 5 netherite pickaxe and haste 2
body:
Makes netherite pickaxes with efficiency 5 and haste 2 instamine deepslate.

This uses the new item components introduced in [24w12a](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/article/minecraft-snapshot-24w12a) to increase the mining speed when mining deepslate. The `minecraft:tool` component is written to all netherite pickaxes. (This means that removing the datapack will cause that data to still remain on them!)
